description: Lead Router Data Integrity Fixes. Fix 5 HIGH issues: (1) update procedure ambiguous status field handling - may silently drop or bypass domain validation [S5]. (2) Score tier thresholds inconsistent - domain LeadScore uses 80/50 but router stats query uses 70/40 [S6]. (3) sortBy accepts arbitrary strings with no enum validation - Prisma orderBy injection risk [S7]. (4) leadListResponseSchema expects 'data' key but router returns 'leads' [W4]. (5) leadResponseSchema missing Lead 360 fields (aiInsight, activities, notes, files, tasks) [D5]. Fix: Explicitly handle status in update, unify thresholds, add sortBy enum, fix schema keys.

validations.name: Task completion verification
validations.notes: Task marked as completed in Sprint_plan.csv
